name: Revision of Class IX Syllabus
description: Basic Java syntax, variables, data types, operators, and conditional flow (if-else, switch-case).

name: Class as the Basis of all Computation
description: Objects and Classes, state and behavior, messaging, class as an object factory.

name: User-Defined Methods
description: Method definition, arguments, return types, pass-by-value vs pass-by-reference, overloading.

name: Constructors
description: Default and parameterized constructors, constructor overloading, 'this' keyword.

name: Library Classes
description: Wrapper classes (Integer, Double, Character), Autoboxing, Character class functions.

name: Encapsulation
description: Access specifiers (private, public, protected, default), data hiding, scope of variables.

name: Arrays in Java
description: 1D and 2D arrays, linear search, binary search, bubble sort, selection sort.

name: String Handling
description: String and StringBuffer classes, common methods (indexOf, substring, trim, replace).
